title: aldama robusta
intro: Aldama robusta, also known as the Mexican tea or yerba de la reina, is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of Mexico. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, pain, and inflammation. The health benefits of Aldama robusta include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The plant can be prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies and supplements, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
